title: Project Budget
scenario: Create a project budget for a software development project with a budget of $100,000. The budget should include a list of expenses, a brief description of each expense, and a rough estimate of the cost of each expense. The output should be a clear and concise table summarizing the project budget.
constraints: Must include a title and a table with at least 4 columns

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is under 250 words and includes a title and a table with at least 4 columns.
Check if the description of each expense is clear and concise.
Check if the rough estimate of the cost of each expense is clear and concise.
